case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. CHRISTINE CRUZ ESCOBAR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $438.99 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CHRISTINE CRUZ
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CHRISTINE CRUZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,271.03 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CHRISTINE CRUZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JAN-28-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CHRISTINE CRUZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA CRUZ ESCOBAR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CHRISTINE CRUZ $1,271.03 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,351.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CHRISTINE CRUZ
